title: Uniform: Maison Tomas rethinks the dress code as architecture
subtitle: The Paris label's spring collection asks whether clothing can be load-bearing
metaDescription: Review of the Maison Tomas spring 2026 collection, Uniform.
bodyHtml: Maison Tomas has spent three seasons moving toward a single question: what does clothing owe the body that wears it? Uniform is the clearest answer yet.

title: Essay: the second life of deadstock fabric
subtitle: What happens when fashion's surplus becomes its only honest material
metaDescription: Essay on deadstock fabric and sustainable fashion practice.
bodyHtml: The warehouse outside Lyon holds enough undyed wool to clothe a small city. It has been there since 1997, when the brand it was made for dissolved three months before launch.

title: Profile: Constance Abe and the slow fashion of restraint
subtitle: The Lagos-born designer on why her latest collection took four years and uses twelve pieces
metaDescription: Profile of designer Constance Abe and her twelve-piece collection.
bodyHtml: Constance Abe works from a studio with no windows facing the street. She does not want to see what people are wearing. She wants to forget.

title: The return of the pleat: a structural history
subtitle: From Chanel's wartime pragmatism to the Antwerp school's geometric revival
metaDescription: Historical essay on the pleat in fashion from 1940 to present.
bodyHtml: The pleat is not a decoration. It is a decision about where the body is allowed to move and how much room that movement is granted.

title: On wearing black in summer: a contrarian case
subtitle: The season's most persistent rule deserves a proper argument against it
metaDescription: Opinion piece on wearing black in summer.
bodyHtml: The prohibition on black in summer is one of those rules that everyone knows and no one can source. It arrived fully formed and has never required justification.

title: Atelier portfolio: six emerging designers from the Balkans
subtitle: A generation trained in scarcity is producing fashion's most inventive material work
metaDescription: Portfolio of six emerging fashion designers from the Balkans.
bodyHtml: Fashion education in Sarajevo, Skopje, and Belgrade operates under constraints that would close most European programs. The work coming out of those programs is remarkable.

title: Reading the archive: Balenciaga's 1967 farewell collection
subtitle: The pieces themselves have not aged. The silence around them has
metaDescription: Archive review of Balenciaga's final 1967 collection.
bodyHtml: The 1967 collection was not announced as a farewell. Balenciaga showed it in February and closed the house in May. No press release, no interview, no explanation.

title: Textile note: the renewed case for linen in tailoring
subtitle: Wrinkle as feature, not flaw: how a handful of houses are changing the brief
metaDescription: Textile essay on linen's resurgence in tailored clothing.
bodyHtml: Linen was removed from tailoring for the same reason it is coming back: it moves. The question is whether you read that movement as error or information.
